description: Business rules for quality validation and derived metrics

suspicious_trip.description: Mark trip as suspicious if any condition is met

invalid_dates.description: Reject records with null or future pickup/dropoff dates

negative_amounts.description: Reject records with negative fare or total amount

invalid_duration.description: Reject records with negative or excessive duration

unrealistic_speed.description: Reject records with average speed > 100 mph

technical_duplicates.description: Reject exact duplicate rows based on key fields

null_critical.description: Reject records with null values in critical columns

recovery_classification.RECOVERABLE_SCHEMA_MISMATCH: Columns exist but types differ; casting can recover
recovery_classification.RECOVERABLE_MISSING_COLUMNS: Some columns missing; null fill can recover
recovery_classification.RECOVERABLE_TYPE_CASTING: Type casting needed; safe cast with error handling
recovery_classification.NOT_RECOVERABLE_CORRUPT_METADATA: Parquet metadata corrupt; cannot read schema
recovery_classification.NOT_RECOVERABLE_EMPTY_FILE: File has zero records or is empty
recovery_classification.NOT_RECOVERABLE_UNSUPPORTED_FORMAT: File format not supported by reader
